name: arc-ready
description: Take a software project from raw idea through PRD, architecture, roadmap, stack pick, repo scaffolding, application build, deploy pipeline, observability, launch, adversarial hardening, and a Pillars agent-memory layer. The full arc, mechanically enforced, in one skill. Consolidated successor to the eleven-skill aihxp/ready-suite (kickoff-ready, prd-ready, architecture-ready, roadmap-ready, stack-ready, repo-ready, production-ready, deploy-ready, observe-ready, launch-ready, harden-ready). Same discipline, same artifacts, one install. Refuses scope leak, AI-slop output, hollow output, feature-factory output, paper SLOs, paper canaries, AI-slop landings, scanner-only security, rubber-stamp orchestration, ghost handoff. Modes A (full arc, greenfield), B (specific tier, existing codebase), C (retroactive audit), D (multi-repo suite layout).
